---
title: "GATA3_ATAC_analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-03"
---

# Compare ATAC-seq signal change (upon GATA3 depletion) properly for GATA3 binding regions

By “properly,” I specifically mean that we are comparing changes in ATAC-seq signal upon GATA3 depletion only at GATA3-bound regions that: \
1) contain one distinct GATA3 motif, \
2) have matched or comparable ChIP-seq intensities, and \
3) have matched or comparable baseline ATAC-seq signals in DMSO. \
After these potential confounding factors are properly controlled, we can compare the ATAC-seq log2FC across regions containing different GATA3 motif variants and determine whether motif variation is associated with differences in chromatin accessibility changes upon GATA3 depletion.
